records.public_reputation: Forge-trance breaker whose rage-state made him the pattern for siege-smashers in early tower consolidation.
records.current_agenda: Keep Soreheim Proper workable through the obligations of berserker while managing the immediate pressure of quota demands in Soreheim Alliance.

records.public_reputation: Industrial stone-wizard supervising heat stabilization and tower-forge containment.
records.current_agenda: Keep Titan Towers, Soreheim workable through the obligations of wizards while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.

records.public_reputation: Living ash-saint to some forge crews, feared by others for preaching endurance as sacred obedience.
records.current_agenda: Keep Ashforge Citadel workable through the obligations of saint while managing the immediate pressure of house rivalry in Psanan.

roster_context.identity: Forge Authority is now linked to the strongest matching named NPC records available in-repository.
